## HISTOGRAM chart, TELOS style

Render as SVG (or equivalent) on a 960x540 px canvas.
Every position, size, and color below is exact. No adjectives, no improvisation.

### AI metadata (for agent routing)
```json
{
  "code": "CH-DST-01",
  "ovp_version": "1.0",
  "intent": [
    "distribution"
  ],
  "form": "contiguous columns counting values per equal bin",
  "data_required": "one numeric measure binned into equal intervals with counts",
  "family": "DST",
  "alternatives": [
    "CH-DST-06 (service-level reading)",
    "CH-DST-09 (smooth shape)"
  ],
  "see_instead": [
    {
      "when": "the question is what share clears a threshold",
      "use": "CH-DST-06"
    },
    {
      "when": "comparing shapes across groups",
      "use": "CH-DST-09"
    }
  ]
}
```

Use when:
- showing the shape of one distribution: skew, mode, outliers
- first look at any new numeric measure

Do NOT use when:
- comparing several distributions (CH-DST-04 or CH-DST-09)
- categorical counts (CH-RNK-01; bins must be numeric intervals)

### Input data shape
```json
{
  "title": "action title with a number",
  "source": "bottom-left always",
  "unit": "on the top count tick",
  "edges": "n+1 ascending bin edges, labeled under the boundaries",
  "counts": "n non-negative counts"
}
```

### Rules
- bars touch: 1px seam only, the variable is continuous
- equal bin widths, edges labeled at the boundaries, not centers
- counts on the y axis start at zero

### Never do this
- gaps between bars
- unequal bins without width-proportional areas
- labeling bin centers
- more than 20 bins

### QA before delivering
- [ ] bars contiguous
- [ ] edges ascending and labeled
- [ ] y starts at zero
- [ ] unit once
- [ ] source present

### Colors (resolved, use these exact values)

| Element | Color |
|---|---|
| background | `#FFFFFF` |
| bar | `#C4001A` |
| gridline | `#E8E6E2` |
| zero_line | `#D9D6D2` |
| tick_label | `#444444` |
| x_label | `#444444` |
| title | `#1A1A1A` |
| source | `#444444` |

### Fonts

- Title font: 'Segoe UI',Arial,sans-serif, weight 700
- All other text: 'Segoe UI',Arial,sans-serif, weight 400 (600 on highlighted items)

### Language chrome

No kicker, no eyebrow; title at the default y.
